aiBuilder.title: AI Profile Interview
aiBuilder.intro: Add your API settings, then chat naturally. AI will ask follow-up questions and generate cards automatically.
aiBuilder.debugHint: Inspect each request, model output, tool call, and parsed generation result.
aiBuilder.noDebugYet: No debug logs yet. Send a message first.
aiBuilder.quickReply1: Let me start with nickname and MBTI
aiBuilder.quickReply2: Start from the games I play most
aiBuilder.quickReply3: I want to highlight my oshis
aiBuilder.welcomeQuestion: Hi! I can build your profile card. What name should I use, and what vibe do you want?
aiBuilder.fallbackQuestion: Great. One more thing: what games or fandoms do you spend the most time on lately?
aiBuilder.inputPlaceholder: Example: I'm Mikan, INFP, I play Genshin and HSR, and I stan Hatsune Miku...
aiBuilder.forceGeneratePrompt: Information is enough. Please call the tool and generate final cards JSON now.
aiBuilder.applySuccess: Done. I applied the generated cards to your editor.
aiBuilder.emptyCardsError: AI did not return usable cards. Add a bit more info and try again.
aiBuilder.unknownError: Generation failed. Please check network, API key, or model name.
